title: To someone not technically savvy, could you explain how versatile/powerful Monday.com custom integrations be? SAP, etc
excerpt: Looking for more information as to specific use cases any of you have created using custom integrations! Thanks.

posts.author: bredlawskk (Barry W.)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for more information as to specific use cases any of you have created using custom integrations! Thanks.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bredlawskk
Monday.com offers API to interact with it.
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs
Additional information about building apps are available at https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/intro
You can also connect your existing solution (if possible) to monday.com using third-party services like Integromat: https://www.integromat.com/en/integrations/monday

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
A simple answer is:

Custom designing monday.com to interact with company’s already built applications is not possible for someone without a lot of technical background

Using third-party services like Integromat lets someone build an integration between monday.com and his existing application without writing a line of code, but it requires at least basic dev skills and knowledge.
